arts.ttl: Newcastle's cup clash postponed due to flooding
arts.sum: Newcastle United's third-round Carabao Cup clash at League 2 side AFC Wimbledon has been postponed due to flooding.

arts.ttl: Man United scout attacker on Tottenham and Newcastle radar at the weekend
arts.sum: Southampton winger Tyler Dibling has attracted the attention of the big clubs with his performances in recent weeks. The 18-year-old has been handed the opportunity to showcase his qualities with the first team and he is looking to establish himself as a key player for Southampton. Has recently impressed with the Premier League side. According […] The post Man United scout attacker on Tottenham and Newcastle radar at the weekend appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: When Newcastle United could play AFC Wimbledon after Carabao Cup postponement
arts.sum: Newcastle United's pre-match press conference was cancelled this morning as news broke about the postponement of their Carabao Cup third round clash with AFC Wimbledon. There is a possibility the game could played during the Carabao Cup fourth round week, though that would pose a further fixture backlog later down the line.

arts.ttl: When is the Carabao Cup fourth-round draw with Newcastle United awaiting third-round date
arts.sum: The draw will take place on Wednesday, September 25 following the final third-round match between Liverpool and West Ham United. Newcastle United will be in the draw for the fourth round of the Carabao Cup, but not in the way they had anticipated.

arts.ttl: EFL Cup: AFC Wimbledon, Newcastle United tie postponed due to floods
arts.sum: Tuesday's EFL Cup third-round tie between AFC Wimbledon and Newcastle United has been postponed due to extensive flooding to the League Two side's ground.

arts.ttl: AFC Wimbledon’s Carabao Cup tie against Newcastle postponed after floods
arts.sum: A rescheduled date will be confirmed in due course.

arts.ttl: AFC Wimbledon vs Newcastle postponed due to flooding
arts.sum: The Carabao Cup third-round tie between AFC Wimbledon and Newcastle has been postponed due to flooding around the Cherry Red Records Stadium.

arts.ttl: Shock footage shows why Newcastle United game cancelled as Wimbledon pitch COLLAPSES
arts.sum: Part of the AFC Wimbledon pitch at Plough Lane has collapsed, leaving Newcastle United's Carabao Cup clash at the ground in jeopardy. "It is a competition we want to do well in.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Newcastle's Carabao Cup clash called off as devastating floods wreak havoc across UK
arts.sum: Newcastle were due to travel to AFC Wimbledon in the third round of the Carabao Cup on Tuesday night, however, the League Two outfit have confirmed the fixture has now been postponed

arts.ttl: Newcastle United clash with Wimbledon OFF as two clubs talk about rearranged date
arts.sum: Newcastle United's clash at Wimbledon is set to be postponed after the Dons declared their pitch "unplayable" at Plough Lane. Newcastle and Wimbledon remain in talks but with the Dons having a midweek fixture next week it could be tricky to squeeze the game in.
